_doc: Per-farm 2026 roster reference. The 'announcement_urls' list points to each farm's published 2026 roster (TDN/BH/farm site). The 'expected_names' array is initially blank — populate it by hand from the announcement, then run audit_rosters.py to diff vs the live CSV. ZERO FABRICATION applies: only fill 'expected_names' from a verified announcement.
_workflow: 1. Open each farm's announcement_urls in a browser
2. Copy the published 2026 stallion list into 'expected_names' (just stallion names)
4. Report shows: missing-from-CSV (potential gaps) and extra-in-CSV (potential pensionees)
5. For genuine missing stallions, append to the matching {farm}-dryrun.csv with verified pedigree from BH register
6. For genuine extras (pensioned/deceased/moved), the existing entry can stay if you want progeny tracking to continue, or remove if no longer relevant

ashford.name: Ashford Stud (Coolmore America)
known_changes_2026: Uncle Mo: euthanized Dec 19, 2024
American Pharoah: shuttled to Japan for 2026 season (we added with shuttle qualifier)
Speightstown: euthanized Dec 8, 2023
Citizen Bull / Fierceness / Sierra Leone: NEW 2026, fees TBD pending Breeders' Cup
Echo Town: relocated to Arkansas for 2026 — REMOVED from Ashford expected list (TDN: 'Echo Town Relocated To Stand In Arkansas For 2026'). May reappear in a future Arkansas-farm CSV.
Journalism: REMAINS IN TRAINING for 2026 — NOT a 2026 freshman; will retire to Ashford for 2027 (ABR: 'Preakness Winner Journalism to Remain in Training to Race in 2026').

darley.name: Darley America (Godolphin)
known_changes_2026: Nyquist: $175,000, top of roster
Medaglia d'Oro: pensioned for 2026 (correctly excluded)
Highland Falls: NEW 2026 addition ($10K)
First Mission: NEW 2026 addition ($10K)

Frosted: euthanized April 15, 2026 due to acute laminitis at Jonabell — announced for 2026 at $12,500 but died before season started. REMOVED. (BH: 'Record-Breaking Met Mile Winner Frosted Dies'; TDN: 'Darley Sire Frosted Succumbs to Laminitis')

spendthrift.name: Spendthrift Farm
known_changes_2026: Yaupon: fee raised to $60,000 (from $25,000)
Chancer McPatrick: NEW 2026 freshman (per TDN announcement)
Goal Oriented: NEW 2026 freshman at $30K (per Spendthrift / BloodHorse / TDN; was missing from one search snippet but confirmed via multiple sources)

winstar.name: WinStar Farm
known_changes_2026: Constitution: top of roster at $110K
Life Is Good: $60K
Straight No Chaser: NEW 2026 freshman ($10K)
Tom's d'Etat: appears DROPPED from 2026 roster (was at $5K in 2025)
Mullikin: NEW 2026 freshman ($10K S&N) — was missing from initial expected_names list (TDN/BH announcements). Added.
Yoshida: relocated to Darley Japan for 2026 — REMOVED from CSV. Same pattern as Game Winner/Knicks Go (sold/moved internationally).

lanesend.name: Lane's End
known_changes_2026: Flightline: $125K, top of roster
Quality Road: $100K (down from $200K in 2023)
Raging Torrent: NEW 2026 freshman ($15K) — by Maximus Mischief, won G1 Metropolitan
Honor Code: sold to Japan in 2023 (correctly excluded)

Game Winner: permanently relocated to Haras Fazenda Mondesir in Brazil (Oct 2025) — REMOVED from Lane's End expected list. (BH: 'Game Winner Relocated to Brazil'; TDN: 'Game Winner To Relocate Permanently To Brazil...'). BH stallion register page now returns 'Stallion Not Found'.
Carl Spackler (Ire): NEW 2026 freshman ($15K LFSN) — by Lope de Vega out of Zindaya; won G1 Coolmore Turf Mile, Fourstardave, Maker's Mark Mile. Was missing from initial expected_names list. Added.

Mineshaft: pensioned April 2025 at age 26 (BH: 'Mineshaft Pensioned From Stud Duty at 26'). Still in CSV for ongoing foal tracking — 20 crops on the ground including Senor Buscador (G1 Saudi Cup winner, now also at Lane's End). Correctly absent from 2026 active roster.

threechimneys.name: Three Chimneys Farm
known_changes_2026: Gun Runner: $250K, top of roster (held flat from 2025)
Sky Mesa: pensioned for 2026 (correctly absent from our DB; no action needed)

gainesway.name: Gainesway Farm
known_changes_2026: Tapit: $185K, top of roster (held flat from 2025)
McKinzie: $75K (pending Breeders' Cup)
Locked: NEW to Gainesway 2026 ($35K) — coming off strong 2025 covering Gun Runner-sired mares

hillndale.name: Hill 'n' Dale Farms at Xalapa
known_changes_2026: Curlin: $225K, top of roster (down from $250K in 2024)
Good Magic: $125K (held flat)
Charlatan: 2026 fee TBD
Barnes: NEW 2026 freshman ($15K S&N) — son of Into Mischief, retired due to tendon injury after $3.2M Saratoga purchase. Syndicate filled within an hour of announcement.
Army Mule: slight bump to $25K

claiborne.name: Claiborne Farm
known_changes_2026: Prince of Monaco: tops fees at $30K (excluding War Front private)
Mindframe: NEW 2026 freshman, $50K LFSN — multiple G1 winner
Johannes: NEW 2026 freshman, $10K LFSN — G1 winner by Nyquist
War Front: PRIVATE fee for 2026
Runhappy: SOLD to South Korea — REMOVED from Claiborne 2026 roster (correctly absent from our DB)

taylormade.name: Taylor Made Stallions
known_changes_2026: Not This Time: top of roster at $250,000
Knicks Go: relocated to Korea for 2026 — REMOVED from Taylor Made expected list (TDN: 'MGISW Knicks Go To Stand In Korea For 2026').
Arthur's Ride: NEW 2026 freshman ($12,500 S&N) — G1 Whitney winner, gray/roan son of Tapit out of Points of Grace. Was missing from initial expected_names list. Added.

airdrie.name: Airdrie Stud
known_changes_2026: Girvin: $30K, top of roster — first Kentucky-bred crop hits the track in 2026
Upstart: $25K — best-bred crop hits as 2YOs in 2026
Mystik Dan: NEW 2026 freshman ($15K) — 2024 Kentucky Derby winner
Jonathan's Way: NEW 2026 freshman ($8,500) — by Good Magic, retired October 2025

Collected: relocated to Rancho San Miguel in California for 2026 (BH: 'Collected Relocates to California at Rancho San Miguel'). Was on Airdrie's Oct 8 announcement at $7,500 but subsequently moved. REMOVED from Airdrie expected_names; correctly absent from our CSV.

calumet.name: Calumet Farm
known_changes_2026: No specific 2026 fee announcement found via web search (BH/TDN/Paulick coverage of Calumet 2026 appears not to have been syndicated). Farm's own stallions page (calumetfarm.com/stallions) was egress-blocked from this workspace. Expected_names left empty pending a verified primary source. Audit will skip this farm cleanly.
Producer (Gb): REMOVED — not a US stud (UK-pedigreed; was missing from BH US stallion register, which is the smoking gun).
